terminals.iterm2-new: osascript -e 'tell application "iTerm" to create window with default profile command "cd %s && clear"'
terminals.iterm2-vim: osascript -e 'tell application "iTerm" to create window with default profile command "cd %s && vim"'
terminals.iterm2-nvim: osascript -e 'tell application "iTerm" to create window with default profile command "cd %s && nvim"'
